message:
test: add 47 proptest property tests for connector_data_classification

Comprehensive proptest coverage for the data classification module:
sensitivity ordering/semantics, redaction strategy mapping, classification
rule field/content matching, policy connector matching, ingestion decision
logic, telemetry arithmetic, classified event analysis helpers (histogram,
has_prohibited, requires_redaction), classifier policy management, default
policy built-in rules, and serde roundtrips for all types.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
